notes: IDE Mode bug-fix release. Fixes two issues: (1) embedded terminals starting at a tiny width so every word wrapped onto its own line — sessions now wait for the font and layout to settle before measuring, so Claude renders at the correct width; (2) sessions falsely dropping to Idle while the model was still thinking or reading — they now stay Working until a hook (done / needs-input) or session exit. Recommended for IDE Mode users.
